audit_items.proof_trace: SerializeToZeroCopyStream returns bool (not a pointer); all 4 call sites in binary_rpc_request.cc properly check the return value before using the written buffer — L146 and L200 use inline if(!ret) early-return guards, while L155/L161 store the result in ser_ret and check it at L164 before computing header fields. The compressed-path stream pointer (os.get()) is never NULL because get_compressed_output_stream either returns a valid object or calls SCHECK(false) which terminates the process for unknown compress types.
